title: Welcome back, {{name}}
subtitle: Your membership, hydration, training, and progress signals in one focused view for {{date}}.

membership.title: Membership
membership.explorePlan: Explore a plan to unlock sessions
membership.statusDesc: Your access window and remaining visit context.
membership.noActiveDesc: You do not have an active membership yet. Explore plans to unlock training access.

water.title: Water today
water.noIntakes: No water logged today. Start with one glass and build momentum.

water.noTargetDesc: Set your daily water target from your profile to start tracking intake.

workoutPlan.title: Workout plan
workoutPlan.noActiveDesc: Once a trainer assigns your plan, today's training focus will appear here.

nextSession.title: Next session
nextSession.noUpcomingDesc: Join a class or book a personal session when the next schedule opens.

goals.title: Active goals

goals.activeGoalsDesc: The latest progress signals from your tracking history.
goals.noActiveGoalsDesc: Create your first goal to turn progress into something visible.
goals.noMeasurementsDesc: Log your first body measurement to unlock trend tracking.

todayPlan.title: Today's Plan
todayPlan.desc: The highest-value actions for your next workout day.

errors.loadFailed: Some dashboard sections could not be refreshed. The rest of your overview is still available.
